forecasts.detailed: Rain showers likely between 9am and 5pm. Mostly cloudy, with a high near 67. Northeast wind 0 to 5 mph. Chance of precipitation is 60%. New rainfall amounts less than a tenth of an inch possible.

A slight chance of rain before noon, then a chance of rain and isolated thunderstorms between noon and 4pm. Mostly cloudy. High near 70, with temperatures falling to around 62 in the afternoon. North wind 2 to 12 mph. Chance of precipitation is 50%. New rainfall amounts between a tenth and quarter of an inch possible.
Partly sunny, with a high near 61. North wind around 10 mph.

Patchy fog and a slight chance of rain showers before 3pm. Mostly cloudy, with a high near 59. Northeast wind around 5 mph. Chance of precipitation is 20%. New rainfall amounts less than a tenth of an inch possible.
Scattered rain showers before 2pm. Mostly sunny, with a high near 69. North wind 6 to 10 mph. Chance of precipitation is 30%. New rainfall amounts less than a tenth of an inch possible.

A slight chance of rain showers between 10am and 3pm. Partly sunny, with a high near 73. Northwest wind around 8 mph. Chance of precipitation is 20%. New rainfall amounts less than a tenth of an inch possible.
